THE ORDER SHALL BE EFFECTIVE UPON FILING OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE. COUNSEL ERIC GODOY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN THE APPROPRIATE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Continued To Oct-22-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Plaintiff JOSE SUAREZ CALDERON, present assisted by Certified Court Spanish Interpreter Shannon Raintree.
Atty. ERIC GODOY, Esq. of SoCal Injury Lawyers (tel: 213-746-4000)(via Zoom videoconference), movant and attorney of record for Plaintiff.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JOSE CALDERON.

Matter discussed. The Court holds in camera discussions along with Plaintiff and Counsel Eric Godoy. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record, effective no earlier than April 23, 2024. The order shall be effective upon filing of the proof of service.

Counsel Eric Godoy is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Continued To Apr-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Plaintiff JOSE SUAREZ CALDERON, present.
Atty. ERIC GODOY, Esq. of SoCal Injury Lawyers (tel: 213-746-4000) (via Zoom videoconference).
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JOSE CALDERON.

Matter discussed. The Court notes Plaintiff requires an interpreter. The Court continues the matter to April 19, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
